rows.notes: Overrode both extractors based on direct visual inspection. The total clearly reads 269 in the pounds column, 0 in the shillings column, and 3 in the pence column. Gemini-flash incorrectly read pounds as 26 and shillings as 9, then interpreted the 3 pence as a fraction. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as 9.
